item.title: Guess the Dish, Get the Ingredients
item.description: Follow along on Snapchat, guess what Josh Elkin is cooking, and you might get an Instacart to make it at home.

media:content.media:title: Guess the Dish, Get the Ingredients
media:content.media:description: Follow along on Snapchat, guess what Josh Elkin is cooking, and you might get an Instacart to make it at home.

item.title: Lasagna Stuffed Garlic Bread
item.description: A comforting fusion of lasagna and garlic bread, packed into one cheesy, layered bite.

media:content.media:title: Lasagna Stuffed Garlic Bread
media:content.media:description: A comforting fusion of lasagna and garlic bread, packed into one cheesy, layered bite.

item.title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
item.description: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes bring a fun, layered twist to classic pizza flavors with crisp tortillas, melty cheese, and savory pepperoni.

media:content.media:title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
media:content.media:description: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes bring a fun, layered twist to classic pizza flavors with crisp tortillas, melty cheese, and savory pepperoni.

item.title: Tortilla Cupcake Pizza Upgrade
item.description: Mini tortilla cups are baked with pizza sauce, cheese, and toppings for a creative upgrade on a simple handheld snack.

media:content.media:title: Tortilla Cupcake Pizza Upgrade
media:content.media:description: Mini tortilla cups are baked with pizza sauce, cheese, and toppings for a creative upgrade on a simple handheld snack.

item.title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
item.description: Tortilla cups are filled with pepperoni, sauce, and cheese, then baked into crispy mini pizza-style snacks.

media:content.media:title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
media:content.media:description: Tortilla cups are filled with pepperoni, sauce, and cheese, then baked into crispy mini pizza-style snacks.

item.title: Upgrading the Breakfast Sandwich
item.description: A breakfast sandwich is rebuilt with improved ingredients and technique, focusing on flavor, texture, and structure for a better morning meal.

media:content.media:title: Upgrading the Breakfast Sandwich
media:content.media:description: A breakfast sandwich is rebuilt with improved ingredients and technique, focusing on flavor, texture, and structure for a better morning meal.

item.title: Ultimate Breakfast Sandwich Build
item.description: A breakfast sandwich is assembled with layered ingredients and cooking techniques designed to enhance flavor, texture, and balance.

media:content.media:title: Ultimate Breakfast Sandwich Build
media:content.media:description: A breakfast sandwich is assembled with layered ingredients and cooking techniques designed to enhance flavor, texture, and balance.

item.title: Golden Breakfast Pancake Recipe
item.description: A golden pancake is cooked to a fluffy texture and served as a simple breakfast dish, focusing on color, consistency, and flavor.

media:content.media:title: Golden Breakfast Pancake Recipe
media:content.media:description: A golden pancake is cooked to a fluffy texture and served as a simple breakfast dish, focusing on color, consistency, and flavor.
